$schema_note: Phase 5 M3 motif-tracking golden set. Each case posts a draft to /v1/analyze-draft with include_motif_tracking=true and asserts that summary.motifs contains at least one of expected_motifs.

cases.name: fire_motif
cases.content:
[verse]
The fire on the hill is burning
The fire in my chest still calls

[chorus]
All we have is fire and ashes
All we have is fire and rain
cases.notes: 'fire' recurs in both verse and chorus; clear motif.
